name: WW Turkey Chili
recipeIngredient: 9 ounces Kidney beans (or red or beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash beans and cover with water. Soak in the refrigerator overnight or for a minimum of four hours at room temperature.
2. Add water, beans, and salt to a soup pot and cook until beans are soft, about one hour. Add water as needed to keep beans covered.
3. Do not drain.
4. Brown ground turkey and onion in the same pot.
5. Combine turkey mixture with beans, tomato sauce, and spices in the soup pot. Simmer over low heat for one or two hours.
6. Add water to achieve the desired consistency. Makes approximately 1 1/2 cups per serving.
Each serving provides: 1 1/4 Vegetables, 3 Proteins, and 10 Options.
